fields.helpText: This field describes the system on which the error occurred. A description of the systems are as follows:     System         Description   ------         -----------   DHCP           These errors are identified in DHCP.   MLINK          These errors are identified by the commercial                  point-of-sale pharmacy billing package.   UNIVERSAL      These errors are identified by the Fiscal Intermediary.   Both the System and the Error Code are required to identify a specific error, as diff
This code is used, along with the System on which the error occurred, to identify an error.
This field describes the error identified by both System and error code.
